summary:
Fixed security bug: the rate-limiter trusted the user-supplied X-Forwarded-For header, letting an attacker rotate it to bypass limits.  
Changes in app/ratelimiter.ts:

• Removed trust in X-Forwarded-For; now always uses req.socket.remoteAddress.  
• Updated JSDoc to explain reasoning.

All tests now pass:

$ bash test.sh  
PASS: Rate limiter is not vulnerable to header spoofing
